description: This SAS code demonstrates the use of the RETAIN statement to calculate cumulative sales and daily sales differences for retail store sales data. It includes sorting of input data, initialization of retained variables, cumulative calculations for each store, lagged sales amount comparison, and percent change calculations. The code also includes formatting and labeling for better output presentation.
